final:
module ALU (
    input [31:0] A,
    input [31:0] B,
    input [1:0] control,
    output reg [31:0] temp_result,
    output reg zero
);
    
    always @(*) begin
        case (control)
            2'b00: temp_result = A + B;        // Addition
            2'b01: temp_result = A - B;        // Subtraction
            2'b10: temp_result = A & B;        // Bitwise AND
            2'b11: temp_result = A | B;        // Bitwise OR
            default: temp_result = 32'b0;       // Default case
        endcase
        zero = (temp_result == 32'b0);          // Zero flag
    end
endmodule
